subtask: Summarize 10 Tableau dashboards into 6 stakeholder-ready insights for a Monthly Business Review using GPT

items.title: awesome-chatgpt-prompts
items.reflection: yes, the content on "awesome-chatgpt-prompts" could potentially help the user accomplish the task. given that the user needs to improve their skills in prompt engineering, a guide on this topic could provide valuable insights and techniques to help them design effective prompts for gpt-4. this could in turn assist them in summarizing tableau dashboards into stakeholder-ready insights.
items.why: "By diving into the 'awesome-chatgpt-prompts' guide on GitHub, you'll gain valuable insights into prompt engineering. This is a key skill for crafting effective AI prompts, which is crucial for your use case. Learning how to engineer precise and clear prompts can significantly enhance the quality of AI-generated slides for your Monthly Business Reviews. Furthermore, understanding these principles can also aid in developing automation workflows, reducing manual effort and improving efficiency in your healthcare claims review process.
